subcodes.first_line: O Ramadan! Know thou that this name was derived from the burning heat. Verily, We are the Ordainer. Therefore it behoveth thee to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رمضان اعلم هذا الاسم کان من الرمضاء انا کنا واضعین لذا ینبغی لک ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
